executives.name: Bruce Carlson
executives.background: Retired General, U.S. Air Force and former Director of the National Reconnaissance Office.

executives.name: Gayla Delly
executives.background: Ms. Delly has served as a director since 2017. She was previously the President and CEO of Benchmark Electronics, Inc. She is a CPA and serves on the boards of Flowserve Corporation and National Instruments.

executives.name: Paul Tufano
executives.background: Paul J. Tufano has been a director since 2005 and Chairman of the Board since 2023. He was formerly the President and CEO of Benchmark Electronics, Inc. and CFO of Alcatel-Lucent.

board_of_directors.name: Bruce Carlson
board_of_directors.background: Retired General, U.S. Air Force and former Director of the National Reconnaissance Office.

board_of_directors.name: Gayla Delly
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Delly has served as a director since 2017. She was previously the President and CEO of Benchmark Electronics, Inc. She is a CPA and serves on the boards of Flowserve Corporation and National Instruments.
